metadata.title: OpenCore Legacy Patcher Wi-Fi and Bluetooth Notes
metadata.description: Plan OCLP Wi-Fi and Bluetooth troubleshooting by checking model, wireless hardware, root patches, and official docs.

page.title: OpenCore Legacy Patcher Wi-Fi and Bluetooth

checker.title: Check wireless risk before an OCLP upgrade
checker.description: Wi-Fi and Bluetooth behavior can vary by Mac model, card generation, macOS version, and post-install patch status.

faq.title: OCLP wireless FAQ
faq.description: Common Wi-Fi and Bluetooth planning limits.

items.question: Why can Wi-Fi work for one user but fail for another?
items.answer: Two Macs with similar names may have different wireless hardware, patches, or macOS versions.

items.question: Does this page provide kext downloads?
items.answer: No. It does not mirror downloads or provide install files.
